name: Sister Sarah's Magic Crawfish
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dry white wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and cayenne to taste.
2. Add hot sauce as desired.
3. Garnish with minced green onions.
In a heavy black iron pot, melt the margarine and sauté the vegetables until well-wilted. Add the crawfish tails and cook for about 10 minutes. Add the soup, water, and wine, stir, and simmer for about half an hour. Add seasonings to taste and cook another 10 minutes. Serve over steamed rice or your favorite pasta and garnish with chopped green onions.
